headlines.title_cn: John Deere owners will get the right to repair equipment under FTC settlement
headlines.title_en: John Deere owners will get the right to repair equipment under FTC settlement

headlines.title_cn: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
headlines.title_en: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
headlines.summary_cn: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
headlines.summary_en: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

headlines.title_cn: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
headlines.title_en: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
headlines.summary_cn: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.
headlines.summary_en: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

headlines.title_cn: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
headlines.title_en: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
headlines.summary_cn: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.
headlines.summary_en: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.

items.title_cn: OpenAI launches new system the Trump administration initially put on a leash
items.title_en: OpenAI launches new system the Trump administration initially put on a leash
items.summary_cn: OpenAI launches new system the Trump administration initially put on a leash  The Washington Post
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches new system the Trump administration initially put on a leash  The Washington Post

items.title_cn: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
items.title_en: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
items.summary_cn: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.
items.summary_en: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.

items.title_cn: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
items.title_en: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
items.summary_cn: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.
items.summary_en: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

items.title_cn: OpenAI is making its biggest play for the office
items.title_en: OpenAI is making its biggest play for the office
items.summary_cn: OpenAI is making its biggest play for the office  Business Insider
items.summary_en: OpenAI is making its biggest play for the office  Business Insider

items.title_cn: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
items.title_en: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
items.summary_cn: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.
items.summary_en: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.

items.title_cn: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
items.title_en: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
items.summary_cn: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."
items.summary_en: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

items.title_cn: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
items.title_en: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
items.summary_cn: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."
items.summary_en: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."

items.title_cn: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
items.title_en: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
items.summary_cn: Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an AI-generated creation.
items.summary_en: Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an AI-generated creation.
